responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Fix the QR code flow that was opening `api.qrserver.com` image URLs in Chrome (causing crashes) by rendering QR codes in-app via local generation, and deploy the fix to production.

## Constraints & Preferences
- React Native (Expo), NOT Swift — user explicitly rejected iOS native
- No hardcoded arrays, static JSON, mock files, or local device storage for tasks
- PRODUCTION_VERIFIED display requires five-point gate: real commit SHA, real deployment ID, health HTTP 200, running commit match, QA evidence
- Forbidden evidence values: AUTO-GENERATED, UNKNOWN, PENDING, PLACEHOLDER, MOCK, NARRATIVE, GENERATED, SIMULATED, ESTIMATED, ASSUMED
- Destructive tasks (mass data deletion) require explicit owner approval — never auto-executed
- GitHub repo `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` is PUBLIC, pushed via Rork-managed GitHub App binding (all `ghp_` tokens revoked)
- Backend: `https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com` (Render), Supabase: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`
- QR image URLs must NEVER be opened in browser — must be rendered as images inside the app
- QR codes should be generated locally from `QR_DESTINATION_URL` using the project's own QR component, not fetched from public endpoints
- Must separate: `QR_IMAGE_URL` (image displayed in-app), `QR_DESTINATION_URL` (link encoded in QR), `RETURN_URL` (route to return to IVX)
- No secrets/tokens/passwords in QR payloads
- Required QR viewer UI: modal/screen, centered QR, title, explanation, close/back/share/copy buttons, loading state, error state, retry button
- Android hardware back must return to previous IVX screen; no auto browser open; no white screen/crash on invalid data
- Destination URL validation must reject: empty, PLACEHOLDER, UNKNOWN, localhost, 127.0.0.1, Rork preview URLs, temporary Expo URLs, expired signed URLs, invalid protocols
- Automated tests must prove QR decodes to `destinationUrl` (decode-match), double-tap blocked, offline/timeout/invalid-data handled

## Progress
### Done
- **Canonical media migration fully deployed and verified** — commit `1103b9188401029bcd5ae3b37da5e34f469ebaed` pushed to main, Render deployed, migration applied (33/33 statements), 24 media rows, 1 reel, 0 orphans, 0 duplicates
- **QR fix v1 deployed and verified live** — commit `482fa472cf130ed3d917e1b704ed561c34acf5f4` pushed, Render boot `2026-07-11T05:21:35.511Z`, web bundle `entry-41599f48…` contains all 5 QR-fix markers (`qr-viewer-modal`, `attachment-tap-qr-intercept`, `Back to IVX`, `QRFlow`); 9/9 unit tests pass; typecheck clean
- **Destructive delete task REJECTED by owner** — `task-d8e11135-0502-4bdf-af1f-c4eca5227ef0` status changed `blocked_owner_approval` → `rejected_unsafe` via owner command; commit `1c53c89c1ace0cddee39364d67f07d32b0951797` deployed; live API confirms `ownerDecision=REJECT`, `executed=false`, `productionDataDeleted=false`; `REJECTED_UNSAFE` status added to canonical task store type system; all production data preserved
- **Task counts verified live**: 60 total, 45 PRODUCTION_VERIFIED, 1 REJECTED_UNSAFE, 14 CANCELLED_OBSOLETE, 0 BLOCKED_OWNER_APPROVAL, 0 FAILED
- **Commit chain**: `69731cb3` → `d975b782` → `635d897d` → `ae137df4` → `1103b918` → `482fa472` (QR fix v1) → `1c53c89c` (task rejection, current HEAD)
- **QR audit complete** — `api.qrserver.com` found only in `expo/constants/platform-config.ts:357` (`generateTrackableLink`); crash path: `openAttachment()` in `ivxChat.ts` + `handleOpenAttachment` in `app/ivx/chat.tsx` both called `Linking.openURL` on any URL
- **QR URL utilities created**: `expo/lib/qr-url.ts` — `isQrImageUrl()`, `extractQrDestinationUrl()`, `validateQrImageUrl()` (HTTP 200 + Content-Type image/* + timeout), `logQrDiagnostics()` (payload-free), `newQrTraceId()`, `safeUrlHost()`, `isProbablyHttpUrl()`
- **In-app QR viewer modal created**: `expo/components/QRViewerModal.tsx` — renders QR locally via `QRCodeView` from destination URL, falls back to validated remote image only if no destination, loading/error/retry states, share/copy/back/close buttons, `onRequestClose` for Android hardware back
- **Chat crash path patched** (`expo/app/ivx/chat.tsx`) — `handleOpenAttachment` intercepts `isQrImageUrl()` and opens `QRViewerModal` instead of `Linking.openURL`; modal rendered before `</ErrorBoundary>`
- **Chat service guard added** (`expo/src/modules/chat/services/ivxChat.ts`) — `openAttachment()` throws if URL is a QR image URL (defense in depth)
- **MessageBubble patched** (`expo/src/modules/chat/components/MessageBubble.tsx`) — intercepts QR image URLs in `handleOpenAttachment`, opens `QRViewerModal` inline
- **Admin marketing QR switched** (`expo/app/admin/marketing.tsx`) — both Image sources replaced with `QRCodeView` local generation from `contentLink.fullUrl` / `selectedLink.fullUrl`
- **Admin influencers QR switched** (`expo/app/admin/influencers.tsx`) — Image source replaced with `QRCodeView` from referral URL, "Download QR" → "Share QR" using `Share.share()`
- **9 unit tests passing** (`expo/__tests__/qr-url.test.ts`) — covers `isQrImageUrl`, `extractQrDestinationUrl`, `isProbablyHttpUrl`, `safeUrlHost` including null/garbage/exp:///token payloads

### In Progress
- **QR fix v2 — stricter validation + double-tap guard — code written, not yet typechecked/tested/committed/deployed**:
  - `expo/lib/qr-url.ts` — added `validateDestinationUrl()` (rejects empty/PLACEHOLDER/UNKNOWN/localhost/127.0.0.1/LAN/Rork/Expo/ngrok/local/expired-signed-URL/invalid-protocol), `containsSensitivePayload()` (detects ghp_/github_pat_/sk-/JWT/password/secret/api_key/session_token patterns), `DestinationValidationResult` type
  - `expo/components/QRViewerModal.tsx` — `resolvedDestination` now uses `validateDestinationUrl()` + `containsSensitivePayload()` before rendering
  - `expo/app/ivx/chat.tsx` — added `qrViewerVisibleRef` (useRef boolean) double-tap guard; reset on close
  - `expo/src/modules/chat/components/MessageBubble.tsx` — added `qrTapGuardRef` (useRef boolean) double-tap guard; reset on close
- **Need to add tests for**: QR decode-match (decode generated QR → equals destinationUrl), destination URL validation, double-tap blocking, offline, timeout, invalid URL rejection, state preservation
- **Need to typecheck, test, commit, push, deploy, and verify production** for QR fix v2

### Blocked
- (none) — destructive task was rejected; BLOCKED_OWNER_APPROVAL count is 0

## Key Decisions
- QR codes are generated locally from the destination URL using the existing `QRCodeView` SVG component — no dependency on `api.qrserver.com` for rendering
- `api.qrserver.com` URLs are detected by `isQrImageUrl()` (host + path + `data` param patterns) and intercepted before any `Linking.openURL` call
- Remote QR image fallback (if ever needed) is validated with HTTP 200 + `image/*` Content-Type + timeout before being rendered as an `<Image>` — never navigated to
- `generateTrackableLink()` in `platform-config.ts` still generates `qrCodeUrl` pointing to `api.qrserver.com` but all consumers now use `fullUrl` with local `QRCodeView` instead — the `qrCodeUrl` field is effectively unused for display
- Diagnostics log route, component, action, image request status, destination validity, navigation target, platform, trace ID — never the QR payload itself
- `REJECTED_UNSAFE` status added to canonical task store at same dedupe rank as `BLOCKED_OWNER_APPROVAL` (rank 4) — tasks cannot be reclassified back to actionable

## Next Steps
1. Add expanded tests: QR decode-match, `validateDestinationUrl`, `containsSensitivePayload`, double-tap guard, offline/timeout/invalid-data
2. Run typecheck (`tsc --noEmit`) on all modified files
3. Run all tests (existing 9 + new)
4. Commit QR fix v2 changes, push to GitHub main
5. Wait for Render autodeploy, verify health endpoint shows new commit
6. Verify live web bundle contains destination validation + double-tap guard markers
7. Return full evidence block with all 22 QA fields from the urgent fix spec

## Critical Context
- **GitHub HEAD**: `1c53c89c1ace0cddee39364d67f07d32b0951797` on `main` (task rejection commit)
- **Render running commit**: `1c53c89c1ace0cddee39364d67f07d32b0951797` (boot `2026-07-11T05:31:50.475Z`, instance `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0-hibernate-7f47db45bc-xd69l`)
- **Workspace has uncommitted QR fix v2 changes** — modified: `expo/lib/qr-url.ts`, `expo/components/QRViewerModal.tsx`, `expo/app/ivx/chat.tsx`, `expo/src/modules/chat/components/MessageBubble.tsx`
- **QR fix v1 already live and verified** — web bundle contains all QR-fix markers; `api.qrserver.com` appears once as unused metadata field, never passed to `Linking.openURL`/`window.open`
- **`QRCodeView`** at `expo/components/QRCodeView.tsx` uses `react-native-svg` + `expo/lib/qr-generator.ts` (pure JS QR matrix generator, EC level M, versions 1-10)
- **Supabase `jv_deal_media`**: 24 rows (8 per project, 1 cover each), `jv_deal_reels`: 1 row (Casa Rosario tour)
- **Root `tsconfig.json` has pre-existing path-mapping errors** in `expo/constants/*` (unrelated to QR changes) — use `expo/tsconfig.json` for clean typecheck

## Relevant Files
- `expo/lib/qr-url.ts` — QR URL detection, destination extraction, image validation, diagnostics, `validateDestinationUrl()`, `containsSensitivePayload()`
- `expo/components/QRViewerModal.tsx` — in-app QR viewer modal with local rendering, loading/error/retry, share/copy/back/close, destination validation
- `expo/components/QRCodeView.tsx` — existing local SVG QR renderer (uses `expo/lib/qr-generator.ts`)
- `expo/lib/qr-generator.ts` — existing pure-JS QR matrix generator
- `expo/app/ivx/chat.tsx` — `handleOpenAttachment` intercepts QR image URLs, renders `QRViewerModal`, double-tap guard via `qrViewerVisibleRef`
- `expo/src/modules/chat/services/ivxChat.ts` — `openAttachment()` throws on QR image URLs (defense in depth)
- `expo/src/modules/chat/components/MessageBubble.tsx` — intercepts QR image URLs, renders `QRViewerModal` inline, double-tap guard via `qrTapGuardRef`
- `expo/app/admin/marketing.tsx` — two `<Image source={{uri: qrCodeUrl}}>` replaced with `<QRCodeView value={fullUrl}>`
- `expo/app/admin/influencers.tsx` — `<Image>` replaced with `<QRCodeView>`, Download QR → Share QR
- `expo/constants/platform-config.ts` — `generateTrackableLink()` still generates `qrCodeUrl` field (now unused for display)
- `expo/__tests__/qr-url.test.ts` — 9 unit tests for QR URL guard helpers
- `backend/services/ivx-canonical-task-store.ts` — canonical task store with `REJECTED_UNSAFE` + `BLOCKED_OWNER_APPROVAL` + `CANCELLED_OBSOLETE` statuses (deployed)
- `backend/api/ivx-canonical-tasks.ts` — read-only task API endpoints (deployed)
- `logs/audit/task-orchestrator/task-d8e11135-0502-4bdf-af1f-c4eca5227ef0/` — task ledger with `rejected_unsafe` status, `TASK_REJECTED_UNSAFE` audit event
